item.title: Market volatility trap? Why this income-first strategy may 'leave a lot on the table'
item.description: The market volatility may be leading retail investors astray.

item.title: Illiquid loans, investor demands: Blue Owl's software lending triggers another quake in private credit
item.description: Blue Owl, a direct lender specializing in loans to the software industry, said it had sold $1.4 billion of its loans to institutional investors at 99....
